---
title: "Differential HPRC-Contig RNAseq Coverage Analysis"
author: "Kyriaki Founta"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load libraries and data
Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(data.table)
```
Load results for cohort of interest
```{r}
dat1 <- read_csv("hprc_contig_pct_coverage-superpop-info.csv") # file with percent contig length coverage per sample for different Ts, as well as population class info per sample as a separate column
head(dat1)
```

## Set up differential coverage function
Function analyzing both strands simultaneously 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)  
library(matrixTests)

run_differential_both_strands <- function(df, threshold = "T1") {  
    
  col_str1 <- paste0("pct_covered_", threshold, "_str1")  
  col_str2 <- paste0("pct_covered_", threshold, "_str2")  
    
  if (!col_str1 %in% colnames(df)) stop(paste(col_str1, "not found"))  
  if (!col_str2 %in% colnames(df)) stop(paste(col_str2, "not found"))  
    
  meta <- df %>% dplyr::select(sample, superpop) %>% distinct()  
  afr_samples <- meta$sample[meta$superpop == "AFR"]  
  eur_samples <- meta$sample[meta$superpop == "EUR"]  
    
  results_list <- list()  
  processing_list <- list()  # <-- NEW: store processing stats  
    
  for (strand in c("str1", "str2")) {  
      
    col_name <- paste0("pct_covered_", threshold, "_", strand)  
    strand_label <- ifelse(strand == "str1", "Strand 1 (Forward)", "Strand 2 (Reverse)")  
      
    cat("\n--- Processing", strand_label, "at", threshold, "---\n")  
      
    coverage_mat <- df %>%  
      dplyr::select(contig, sample, all_of(col_name)) %>%  
      pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = all_of(col_name), values_fill = 0) %>%  
      column_to_rownames("contig") %>%  
      as.matrix()  
      
    afr_mat <- coverage_mat[, afr_samples, drop = FALSE]  
    eur_mat <- coverage_mat[, eur_samples, drop = FALSE]  
      
    row_has_signal <- (rowSums(afr_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) |  
                      (rowSums(eur_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)  
      
    # --- Save processing stats ---  
    processing_list[[strand]] <- data.frame(  
      threshold       = threshold,  
      strand          = strand_label,  
      contigs_total   = nrow(coverage_mat),  
      contigs_signal  = sum(row_has_signal),  
      contigs_removed = sum(!row_has_signal)  
    )  
      
    cat("Contigs total:       ", nrow(coverage_mat), "\n")  
    cat("Contigs with signal: ", sum(row_has_signal), "\n")  
    cat("Contigs removed:     ", sum(!row_has_signal), "\n")  
      
    afr_mat <- afr_mat[row_has_signal, , drop = FALSE]  
    eur_mat <- eur_mat[row_has_signal, , drop = FALSE]  
      
    wt <- row_wilcoxon_twosample(afr_mat, eur_mat, exact = FALSE)  
      
    pseudo <- 0.0001  
    mean_afr <- rowMeans(afr_mat, na.rm = TRUE)  
    mean_eur <- rowMeans(eur_mat, na.rm = TRUE)  
      
    res <- data.frame(  
      contig       = rownames(afr_mat),  
      mean_AFR     = mean_afr,  
      mean_EUR     = mean_eur,  
      log2FC       = log2((mean_afr + pseudo) / (mean_eur + pseudo)),  
      diff_AFR_EUR = mean_afr - mean_eur,  
      pvalue       = wt$pvalue,  
      padj         = p.adjust(wt$pvalue, method = "BH"),  
      strand       = strand_label,  
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE  
    )  
      
    res$color_group <- case_when(  
      res$padj < 0.05 & res$diff_AFR_EUR > 0  ~ "Enriched in AFR",  
      res$padj < 0.05 & res$diff_AFR_EUR < 0  ~ "Enriched in EUR",  
      TRUE ~ "NS"  
    )  
      
    results_list[[strand]] <- res  
  }  
    
  combined <- bind_rows(results_list)  
  processing_summary <- bind_rows(processing_list)  
    
  # Enrichment summary  
  enrichment_summary <- combined %>%  
    group_by(strand, color_group) %>%  
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%  
    pivot_wider(names_from = color_group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%  
    mutate(threshold = threshold)  
    
  cat("\n--- Processing Summary ---\n")  
  print(processing_summary)  
  cat("\n--- Enrichment Summary ---\n")  
  print(enrichment_summary)  
    
  return(list(  
    results             = combined,  
    processing_summary  = processing_summary,  
    enrichment_summary  = enrichment_summary  
  ))  
}  

```

## Run differential coverage analysis
Combined strand analysis for T100
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

out <- run_differential_both_strands(dat1, threshold = "T100")
res_both <- out$results

res_both[which(res_both$padj < 0.05),]
```

Save significant results
```{r}
write.csv(res_both[which(res_both$padj < 0.05),], "sig_diff_contigs_t100.csv",
          row.names=FALSE)
```
